system.description: Flamethrower tanks are usable only by flamethrowers. These tanks hold a liquid fuel and a gas propellant. The gas is what forces the liquid out of the flamethrower nozzle at high speed, allowing it to project a long stream. One tank holds 9 bursts worth of fuel. The tanks remain a separate item when connected to a flamethrower. They can be worn in place of a backpack, reducing Load to 1. Alternatively, you can set them down nearby if you don't intend to move.
